name: 退款政策页面布局
description: Rummy Overdrive 主题退款政策页面布局

config.content.title: Refund Policy
config.content.body: This Refund Policy outlines how Rummy Overdrive reviews payment disputes, failed deposits, duplicate charges, and other refund-related requests.
config.toc.items:
Eligibility for Review|Refund reviews are available for failed transactions, duplicate charges, or technical processing errors. Gameplay losses are not refundable.
Request Process|Contact support with your registered email, transaction ID, and a clear description of the issue.
Processing Time|Most verified requests are reviewed within 5 to 7 business days, depending on the payment provider.
Refund Destination|Approved refunds are generally returned to the original payment method whenever possible.
Non-Refundable Items|Completed entries, consumed bonuses, and finished event purchases are not refundable.
Support Contact|Reach support with the subject line Refund Request and include full transaction details for faster handling.
